exam_name: SAFE MLO Test — State Component (various states)
passing_score_scale: Percentage (75% passing for all SAFE MLO test components)
exam_format: Linear (Pearson VUE in-person or OnVUE online proctored)
exam_price_notes: $69 USD in addition to the national component (UST); required in some states

testing_centers.notes: In-person testing at Pearson VUE test centers nationwide. Online proctoring available via Pearson VUE OnVUE.

id_requirements: Two forms of ID required at Pearson VUE test center: one government-issued photo ID with signature (primary) and one additional ID. Name on IDs must match NMLS registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Online proctored via Pearson VUE OnVUE: must be alone in room, no second monitors. Calculator provided on-screen; no personal calculators allowed. Candidates must complete NMLS-required pre-licensure education (PE) before scheduling. NMLS background check and credit report must be on file prior to testing.
renewal_options: MLO licenses are renewed annually through NMLS. 8 hours of continuing education (CE) required each year, including: 3 hours of federal law, 2 hours of ethics, 2 hours of non-traditional mortgage lending, and 1 hour of undefined instruction. State-specific CE may be required in addition to federal CE requirements. Renew at mortgage.nationwidelicensingsystem.org.

prerequisites.description: Must pass the national component (UST or NTP) before or concurrently with the state component. Required only in states that mandate a separate state component.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period after 1st and 2nd failed attempts. 180-day waiting period after 3rd and subsequent failed attempts. Each retake requires full exam fee ($110 or $69).

official_study_resources.title: NMLS Testing Candidate Handbook
official_study_resources.notes: Free candidate handbook available at NMLS resource center

aliases: safe mlo test state component various states
